name: HABA Laboratories,Inc.
summary: HABA Laboratories,Inc. manufactures and sells skin care, and hair and body care products in Japan and internationally. Its skin care products include cleansers/face washes, toners, special care products, and squalane oils; and hair and body care products comprise shampoos, conditioners, soaps, and hair and hand treatment products. The company sells its products through mail order, shops, drug/variety stores, and internet. It has approximately 70 HABA shops located in department stores, shopping malls, etc. HABA Laboratories,Inc. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
